reasoning: Pre-season sportsbooks priced the Dodgers at +145 to win the NL Pennant (approx. 40.8% implied probability without adjusting for vig). The Polymarket quote as of mid-April 2025 (41%) aligns with this figure. Sports news reports indicate the Dodgers had an extremely strong start to the 2025 season (an 8-0 run), and while they have dealt with some minor pitching injuries, none are serious enough to derail their status as the heavy favorite. Further, their World Series odds improved from +290 in late March to +245 by mid-April according to NJ.com, reflecting increased confidence from oddsmakers after their start. Given the high variance of MLB playoffs, it's rare for a team to exceed 40-45% chance to win the pennant in April, but the Dodgers' historically stacked roster and hot start justify keeping the estimate anchored firmly at the 41% market consensus.
